response.justification: Bogdan has solid breadth across web, embedded, and infrastructure engineering with roughly 20 years of hands-on experience, which satisfies the tenure floor. However, the role is a Director-level IC requiring deep, demonstrated AI strategy expertise and the ability to advise strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge AI adoption. His AI work is nascent — limited to MCP tooling at his current role since April 2025 — and there is no evidence of AI products built at scale, recognized AI expertise in the field, or cloud platform depth. His seniority track is Senior/Staff engineer, not Principal/Director, and the gap between his current positioning and the advisory, thought-leadership demands of this role is significant.
strengths: 20 years of diverse engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, meeting and exceeding the 15-year minimum
Demonstrated entrepreneurial instinct through founding and maintaining GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production by NGOs
Active knowledge-sharing history via conference talks (FOSS4G), full-day workshops, and training courses, showing communication and teaching ability
concerns: AI experience is shallow and very recent (April 2025 only), with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale that would establish recognized expertise
No cloud platform depth — AWS CDK appears once in a pricing-team context; there is no evidence of cloud architecture, strategy, or advisory work

Current seniority ceiling is Staff/Senior engineer; the role requires Director-level individual contributor judgment, executive presence, and the ability to advise strategic partners — none of which are evidenced
